title: TsBuilderV2ExecutorSchema
description: Modern Rollup-based TypeScript library builder. Produces ESM, CJS, IIFE/UMD bundles and type declarations with tree-shaking. Equivalent to ng-packagr for plain TypeScript / web libraries.

tsConfigPath.description: Path to the tsconfig file. Relative to project root if it starts with './' or '../', otherwise resolved against the workspace root.

outputPath.description: Destination directory relative to the workspace root.

entry.description: Library entry point(s). 'auto' compiles every .ts file under the source root (excluding *.spec.ts and *.d.ts). Single string, array of file paths, or a name->path map for multi-entry libs. Paths are relative to the project root.

sourceRoot.description: Source root used when entry is 'auto'. Relative to the project root. Defaults to 'src'.

name.description: Logical name used for flat bundle filenames (FESM, IIFE, UMD). Defaults to the project name.

formats.description: Which output formats to produce. Set a value to false to disable.

esm.description: ESM output. Boolean enables defaults; object configures per-file vs flat bundle.

cjs.description: CommonJS output for legacy Node consumers.

iife.description: Self-contained IIFE bundle(s) for use via CDN <script> tags. Top-level options describe the root bundle (built from the primary entry); the optional `entries` map adds one self-contained IIFE per listed entry, each at `iife/<entry>.js` with a global derived from the root name (e.g. `TelperionElements.Icon`).

name.description: Global variable name for the root bundle. Required when emitting the root bundle; per-entry bundles fall back to a nested name when omitted.

fileName.description: Output filename for the root bundle (without extension). Defaults to the library name.

globals.description: Map of external module name to global variable name. Used only for entries that remain external.

entries.description: Per-entry IIFE bundle overrides keyed by entry name (matches keys in `entry`). An empty object enables the entry with derived defaults.

name.description: Override the derived nested global name for this entry.

fileName.description: Override the output filename (without extension). Defaults to the entry name.

umd.description: UMD bundle(s) for legacy script-tag consumers and AMD loaders. Same multi-entry semantics as `iife`.

external.description: Modules to treat as external (not bundled). 'auto' derives the list from the project's package.json (dependencies + peerDependencies + Node builtins).

bundleDependencies.description: Dependencies that should be force-bundled even when 'external' would otherwise mark them external. Useful for IIFE/CDN builds.

minify.description: Minification settings. Boolean toggles all output, object enables per format.

clean.description: Remove the output directory before building.

tsconfigPaths.description: Resolve path aliases declared in the workspace tsconfig.base.json so workspace imports get inlined into the build.

outputManifest.description: Emit a `.build-manifest.json` file at the dist root that lists every entry and its produced output files. Consumed by `fill-package-json-v2` to derive the exports map without re-walking the dist tree. `true` writes the default name; a string is used as the file name (relative to `outputPath`).

concurrency.description: Maximum number of format builds to run in parallel. Defaults to half the available CPU cores (clamped to 1..6) which keeps memory usage bounded for libraries with many entries.
